positive: A mesmerizing celestial woodland scene, featuring glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna intertwined with swirling nebulas and crescent moons. The composition is centered and symmetrical, showcasing stylized mountain silhouettes bathed in deep indigo and emerald light. Incorporate subtle details like glowing fireflies and stylized constellations that form pathways. The overall aesthetic should be rich, illustrative, and high-contrast, reminiscent of sophisticated tattoo flash art or dark academia engravings. Focus on clean silhouettes, smooth gradients, and dynamic lighting that makes the glowing elements pop against the deep background. Ideal for apparel printing.
negative: lowres, blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, logo, grainy, noisy, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, muddy colors, photorealism, cartoon, abstract shapes, messy lines
